entries.source: "Ask Ambedkar about democracy"
entries.value: "গণতন্ত্ৰৰ বিষয়ে আম্বেদকাৰক সোধা"

entries.source: "Meet Ada Lovelace"
entries.value: "Ada Lovelace-ৰ সৈতে পৰিচয় হওক"

entries.value: "Cleopatra-ৰ সৈতে কথা পাতক"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Talk to a historical person on inspir for immersion learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: immersion learning-ৰ বাবে inspir-এ Talk to a historical person ব্যৱহাৰেৰ practical guide, সৈতে prompts, study loops, আৰু safer AI habits।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: অধিক শক্তিশালী study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI টিউটৰ

entries.source: Ask better questions.
entries.value: অধিক ভাল প্ৰশ্ন কৰক।

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer-ৰ বদলে এটা small first step বিচাৰোঁুন।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI-কে কেৱল result নহয়, আপোনাৰ reasoning check কৰিবলৈ বলুন।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory পৰা idea ফিৰিয়ে লিখে শেষ কৰক।

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: ইমাৰ্ছন

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: যিসকল শিক্ষাৰ্থীয়ে ঐতিহাসিক প্ৰেক্ষাপটত মানুহ, পছন্দ আৰু ধাৰণাসমূহ বুজিব বিচাৰে।

entries.source: Meet a figure.
entries.value: এজন figure-ৰ সৈতে দেখা কৰক।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: চেষ্টা কৰাৰ prompts

entries.source: Start the live mode at Talk to a historical person. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate with a personality. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Talk to a historical person-এ live mode শুৰু কৰক। neighboring learning format বিচাৰোঁলে Debate with a personality চেষ্টা কৰক। platform-ৰ broader view-ৰ বাবে AI learning companion সবাৰ বাবে কী কৰা উচিত তা পড়ুন।

entries.source: Talk to a historical person
entries.value: ঐতিহাসিক ব্যক্তিৰ সৈতে কথা পাতক

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits।

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI: practical guide
entries.value: AI-ৰ সৈতে ঐতিহাসিক ব্যক্তিৰ লগত কথা পাতক: ব্যৱহাৰিক গাইড

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode ক বতাএং কি আপুনি কবা learn বা produce কৰিবলৈ ৰ কশিশ কৰ ৰহে হয়।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: ই difference flow ত দিখতা হয়। এক giant response সলনি best sessions এক loop পৰা গুজৰতে হয়: goal set কৰক, কুছ try কৰক, feedback লেং, weak spot repair কৰক আৰু next action চুনেং।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: ই focus matters কৰে। general chatbot লগভগ কুছ ভী answer কৰ সকতা হয়, কিন্তু learning mode conversation ক shape দেতা হয়। ই আপুনিক উস thinking, practice, feedback বা exploration ৰ ওৰ nudges কৰে জিসসে idea টিকতা হয়।

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: এই এপে চৰিত্ৰৰ সৈতে হোৱা কথোপকথনক তথ্য আৰু অনিশ্চয়তাৰ চমু টোকাসমূহৰ পৰা পৃথক কৰি ৰাখে।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: ই ৱ habit হয় যিসকলে cheating কিএ নোহোৱাকৈ AI সৈতে studying ৰ পীছে হয়: learner ক active ৰখেং। AI তব সবসে useful হোতা হয় জব ৱহ আপুনিৰ thinking পৰ feedback দেতা হয়।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: ই mode উন শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকল বাবে খাসতৌৰ পৰ useful হয় যিসকলে বিচাৰে:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: ইস চৰণ ক নিজৰ শবদোং ত আজমাএঁ।

entries.source: Understand the era.
entries.value: যুগটো বুজক।

entries.source: Use Talk to a historical person when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: সোনকালে আৰম্ভ হোৱা কিন্তু আপোনাৰ লগত খাপ খোৱা session বিচাৰিলে Talk to a historical person ব্যৱহাৰ কৰক। প্ৰথম লক্ষ্য impressive শোনোৱা নহয়। প্ৰথম লক্ষ্য হ'ল পৰৱৰ্তী পদক্ষেপটো সম্ভৱ যেন অনুভৱ কৰোৱা।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: কবা this মোড helps with

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: আগে কহাঁ জাএঁ

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: আপুনি নিজৰ real problem ৰ rough version পৰা ভী শুৰূ কৰ সকতে হয়। পহলা prompt messy হো তো ভী ঠীক হয়। শুৰূ কৰিবলৈ ৰ বাদ session level, audience, deadline আৰু style ক clarify কৰ সকতা হয়।
